description: Blender 5.0.1 (official MSI). The SOLE baked Blender on both free images: it is the canonical/calibrated version for the blender_character_reconstruction_from_multiview_01 eval (which rejects 4.5.x and prefers 5.0.x), and every other Blender task runs on it. Install removes any other Blender (5.1 / C:\Tools\Blender 4.5) so the eval's 'newest-installed-wins' resolution always lands on 5.0.1. Path: C:\Program Files\Blender Foundation\Blender 5.0
